title: Template Manifest Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 4 Wave 1 — populated template-manifest family schema. Outermost wrapper carrying template identity, version, ownership, source-traceability, supported enum bindings, and global MVP status metadata. Field set traces verbatim to fields/families/template-manifest.fields.json and Standard Project Site Template Contract §4. mvp_status binds to the canonical Decision Closure four-value enum (VR-24).

templateName.description: Canonical template name. Contract value: 'HB Standard Project Site Template'.

templateType.description: Template type description. Contract value: 'SharePoint Online team site (governed, branded, full-page shell)'.

templateVersion.description: Semver-style template version; frozen at first release.

templateFamily.description: Template family classification. Contract value: 'Project Sites'.

functionAppDomain.description: Function App domain. Public, not a secret.

applicationClientId.description: Application (client) ID. Public per Contract §4; not a secret. VR-13 still applies to all secret-class material associated with the app.

supportedProjectStages.description: Allowed ProjectStage values bound by VR-02. Anti-regression (VR-04): 'Archived' is never a valid projectStage.

supportedProjectTypes.description: Allowed ProjectType values bound by VR-01. Anti-regression (VR-05, VR-06): 'active_construction', 'preconstruction_only', and 'warranty_closeout' are never valid projectType values.

supportedProjectStatus.description: Allowed ProjectStatus values bound by VR-03.

effectiveDate.description: Effective date of this template version.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Canonical Decision Closure Register status — VR-24; bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.DecisionClosureStatus.

projectStage.description: Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.ProjectStage. Anti-regression: 'Archived' is forbidden as ProjectStage (VR-04).

projectType.description: Bound to enums.schema.json canonicalEnumSets.ProjectType. Anti-regression: 'active_construction', 'preconstruction_only', 'warranty_closeout' are forbidden as ProjectType (VR-05, VR-06).
